MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ART WALKER's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel is GRANTED. The court will execute the order if it was provided with the moving papers if correct. Otherwise, counsel to prepare order. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-02-2017 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Sarah Shapiro, esq. (415-315-1653) of Mellen Law Firm for Plaintiff/opposing party Art Walker.
Charles W. Nunley, II, esq. (949-252-9400) of Malcolm Cisneros for Defendant/Moving party CENTRAL MORTGAGE COMPANY, A BUSINESS ENTITY.

The Court announces its Tentative Ruling. ARGUED re: written waiver. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CENTRAL MORTGAGE COMPANY, A BUSINESS ENTITY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is taken under submission. Prevailing party to submit order conforming to the tentative ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Sarah Shapero, 415-315-1653 for Plaintiff/Moving party Art Walker.

Not argued. Ms. Shapero informs the Court that parties met and conferred and have stipulated to continue the trial date to June 19, 2017. The Court rules as follows: PLAINTIFF ART WALKER's Motion For Leave To File Amended Complaint is GRANTED. First Amended Complaint shall be filed forthwith. Trial date shall be continued to June 19, 2017. Parties complied with the Courts tentative ruling to meet and confer regarding new trial date and present a proposed order to the Court at the hearing. Order signed in Open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Off Calendar Jul-12-2016 Continued To Jul-19-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Plaintiff Art Walker Not Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses From Defendant Central Mortgage Company And For Sanctions For Discovery Abuse
Off Calendar May-05-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Sarah Shapero, of the Mellen Law Firm, Tel. 650.638.0120, for plaintiffs;
Charles W. Nunley, II, of Malcolm Cisneros, Tel. 949.252.9400, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. Plaintiff Art Walker Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses From Defendant Central Mortgage Company is DENIED as moot. The defendant's second supplemental responses comply with CCP section 2031.210. (See 2d Suppl. Resp. at 2:8-14). However, those responses were not served until one week after the motion to compel was filed. Accordingly, sanctions are awarded in the amount of $2,040.00, payable within 10 days of Notice of Entry of Order. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
